scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,plugins,gui -c blue,magenta,green "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:plugins" "npm run dev:gui"
scripts.docker:infra:live:dev: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml -f docker-compose.live.yml up --build
scripts.docker:gui:dev: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.gui.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml up --build
scripts.docker:gui:live: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.gui.yml -f docker-compose.live.yml up --build
scripts.docker:gui:live:dev: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.gui.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml -f docker-compose.live.yml up --build
